name: Homemade Italian Sauce
recipeIngredient: 84 oz crushed tomatoes (3 x 28 oz cans)
84 oz stewed tomatoes (3 x 28 oz cans)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add carrots, onions, and garlic. Cook until all ingredients are tender.
3. Stir in undrained crushed tomatoes, sugar, salt, basil, oregano, and black pepper.
4. Boil gently, uncovered for 1 hour.
5. Allow the sauce to cool.
6. Transfer one-quarter of the mixture into a food processor and process until smooth.
7. Repeat with remaining sauce.
